languages.text: "Ни слуху ни духу. Который день ждем. Зуб даю, что с ними что-то случилось, придется самим выкручиваться. Ну, нам с ребятами не привыкать. Сказали стоять — значит, выстоим".

traits.locale_text: "Ни слуху ни духу. Который день ждем. Зуб даю, что с ними что-то случилось, придется самим выкручиваться. Ну, нам с ребятами не привыкать. Сказали стоять — значит, выстоим".

languages.text: "Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."
languages.original_text: "Ни слуху ни духу. Который день ждем. Зуб даю, что с ними что-то случилось, придется самим выкручиваться. Ну, нам с ребятами не привыкать. Сказали стоять — значит, выстоим".

traits.locale_text: "Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."

"Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."

"Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."

languages.text: “没有，我们已经等了好几天了。他们肯定出事了，我们得自己想办法扛过去。不过我和我的弟兄们早习惯了。上头叫我们坚持住，那我们就坚持住。”
languages.original_text: "Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."

traits.locale_text: “没有，我们已经等了好几天了。他们肯定出事了，我们得自己想办法扛过去。不过我和我的弟兄们早习惯了。上头叫我们坚持住，那我们就坚持住。”

languages.text: « Aucune. Ça fait des jours qu'on les attend. Il leur est arrivé quelque chose, je vous le garantis. On va devoir se débrouiller tout seuls, mais on a l'habitude, mes gars et moi. On nous a dit de tenir bon et c'est exactement ce qu'on va faire. »
languages.original_text: "Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."

traits.locale_text: « Aucune. Ça fait des jours qu'on les attend. Il leur est arrivé quelque chose, je vous le garantis. On va devoir se débrouiller tout seuls, mais on a l'habitude, mes gars et moi. On nous a dit de tenir bon et c'est exactement ce qu'on va faire. »

languages.text: "Hiçbir şey bilmiyorum. Günlerdir bekliyoruz. Başlarına bir şey geldiği kesin. Kendi başımızın çaresine bakmak zorunda kalacağız. Ben ve adamlarım bu duruma yabancı değiliz. Bize dayanmamız söylendi, biz de öyle yapacağız."
languages.original_text: "Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."

traits.locale_text: "Hiçbir şey bilmiyorum. Günlerdir bekliyoruz. Başlarına bir şey geldiği kesin. Kendi başımızın çaresine bakmak zorunda kalacağız. Ben ve adamlarım bu duruma yabancı değiliz. Bize dayanmamız söylendi, biz de öyle yapacağız."

languages.text: «Nada de nada. Llevamos días esperando. Les ha pasado algo, se lo aseguro. Vamos a tener que apañárnoslas por nuestra cuenta, pero los muchachos y yo estamos acostumbrados a estas cosas. Nos mandaron aguantar aquí y eso haremos».
languages.original_text: "Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."

traits.locale_text: «Nada de nada. Llevamos días esperando. Les ha pasado algo, se lo aseguro. Vamos a tener que apañárnoslas por nuestra cuenta, pero los muchachos y yo estamos acostumbrados a estas cosas. Nos mandaron aguantar aquí y eso haremos».

languages.text: "Nichts. Wir haben tagelang gewartet. Irgendwas ist ihnen passiert, garantiert. Wir müssen uns wohl allein durchschlagen. Aber das sind meine Jungs und ich gewohnt. Uns wurde gesagt, wir sollen durchhalten, und genau das machen wir."
languages.original_text: "Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."

traits.locale_text: "Nichts. Wir haben tagelang gewartet. Irgendwas ist ihnen passiert, garantiert. Wir müssen uns wohl allein durchschlagen. Aber das sind meine Jungs und ich gewohnt. Uns wurde gesagt, wir sollen durchhalten, und genau das machen wir."

languages.text: 「何もない。何日も待っていた。何かあったに違いない。自分たちで何とかしなければならない。でも、僕たちには慣れている。耐えるように言われたから、耐えるだけだ。」
languages.original_text: "Not a thing. We've been waiting days. Something's happened to them, I guarantee it. We'll have to muddle through on our own. But me and my lads are no strangers to that. We were told to stick it out, so that's what we'll do."

traits.locale_text: 「何もない。何日も待っていた。何かあったに違いない。自分たちで何とかしなければならない。でも、僕たちには慣れている。耐えるように言われたから、耐えるだけだ。」
